title: Department Manager Vacancy at Tupperware India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at Tupperware India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at Tupperware India are looking for an experienced Department Manager based out of Visakhapatnam. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Tupperware India:
Tupperware India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Flexible working hours
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual performance appraisal
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Tupperware India!
